subcodes.first_line: O Lord and my Hope! Verily, this is a handmaiden from among Thy maidservants and a leaf from among the leaves of the tree of Thy mercy, who hath believed in Thee and in Thy signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی ان هذه امه من امائک و ورقه من ورقات شجره رحمانیتک آمنت بک و بایاتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @firmness in the Covenant
